Joinder In Airbnbs Motion To File Under Seal
Off Calendar Sep-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF A. R., C. G.'s Joinder In Airbnbs Motion To File Under Seal

Grant.

The court understands only the personally identifying information is to be redacted from the public file, such that for example Ex. P to the M. Chauvet declaration will have redacted only the name in the first line.

The parties must provide a proposed order in compliance with and making the findings required by CRC 2.550(d) and 2.551(e).

The parties are reminded that in the future, unless the confidential information (e.g. a true name) must be considered by the court to resolve the underlying motion (e.g. a petition to compel arbitration), the parties should simply redact the confidential information and file the document in the public file, without more. No motion to seal is then needed.

Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Under Seal
Off Calendar Sep-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.'s Motion To File Under Seal

Granted. The court understands only the personally identifying information is to be redacted from the public file, such that for example Ex. P to the M. Chauvet declaration will have redacted only the name in the first line.

The parties must provide a proposed order in compliance with and making the findings required by CRC 2.550(d) and 2.551(e).

The parties are reminded that in the future, unless the confidential information (e.g. a true name) must be considered by the court to resolve the underlying motion (e.g. a petition to compel arbitration), the parties should simply redact the confidential information and file the document in the public file, without more. No motion to seal is then needed.

Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK)
